title: rousselia lappulacea
intro: Rousselia lappulacea, also known as the Mexican tea or Mexican mint marigold, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rousselia lappulacea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Rousselia lappulacea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
